site.title: Pokemontology
site.tagline: A public ontology for Pokemon battle mechanics, replay-backed state, and validation.

artifacts.label: Ontology
artifacts.description: Published OWL/Turtle bundle assembled from the modular ontology source.

artifacts.label: SHACL Shapes
artifacts.description: Validation shapes used for replay slices, save-state data, and ingestion outputs.

artifacts.label: Mechanics Base
artifacts.description: Canonical entities, variants, typings, move properties, type chart data, and ruleset-scoped assignments excluding learnset archives.

artifacts.label: Current Learnsets
artifacts.description: Current-generation learnset coverage from the canonical mechanics graph, including the PokeAPI default ruleset and Scarlet/Violet-era records.

artifacts.label: Modern Learnsets
artifacts.description: Historical learnset archive for 3DS and Switch-era games prior to the current generation.

artifacts.label: Legacy Learnsets
artifacts.description: Older learnset archive for pre-3DS generations and side-game rulesets.

pipelines.name: Replay ingestion
pipelines.summary: Acquire public Showdown replays, curate a competitive corpus, and transform JSON logs into ontology slices.

pipelines.name: PokeAPI ingestion
pipelines.summary: Cache public API resources and convert the cleanly mappable subset into ontology-native Turtle.
pipelines.command: python3 -m pokemontology pokeapi ingest examples/pokeapi/seed-config.json --raw-dir data/pokeapi/raw --output build/pokeapi.ttl

pipelines.name: Veekun ingestion
pipelines.summary: Fetch the upstream Veekun CSV snapshot, normalize it, and emit version-group-scoped mechanics assignments with explicit provenance.
pipelines.command: python3 -m pokemontology veekun ingest --raw-dir data/veekun/raw --source-dir data/veekun/export --output build/veekun.ttl

examples.name: Replay-backed battle slice
examples.summary: A worked example of a replay-derived battle graph with events, assignments, and validation coverage.

examples.name: Seed fixture
examples.summary: Compact seed data for ontology tests and examples around owned combatants, moves, and save-state entities.

examples.name: Replay JSON source
examples.summary: A cached Showdown replay used as a source document for parsing, summarization, and slice generation.

examples.name: PokeAPI seed config
examples.summary: A sample seed file for fetching and transforming a narrow, ontology-safe subset of PokeAPI data.

query_examples.label: super effective moves

schema_pack.summary: Compact grounding pack for Professor Laurel retrieval, local translation, and validator checks.
